languages.original_text: "Artisan Decabalus is too deft with his words. I would not recommend intervening on his behalf without first uncovering the full background to these events."

languages.text: "Артизан Декабалус слишком ловко обращается со словами. Я бы не рекомендовал включаться в события на его стороне, не раскрыв полной подоплеки произошедшего".
languages.translation_comment: The characters spoke with the tech-priest, who was acting suspiciously

languages.text: 「職人デカバルスは言葉巧みすぎる。この事件の背景をすべて明らかにするまでは、彼の代理で介入することをお勧めしない」
languages.original_text: "Artisan Decabalus is too deft with his words. I would not recommend intervening on his behalf without first uncovering the full background to these events."

traits.locale_text: 「職人デカバルスは言葉巧みすぎる。この事件の背景をすべて明らかにするまでは、彼の代理で介入することをお勧めしない。」

languages.text: « L'artisan Décabalus est trop habile avec les mots. Avant d'intervenir en son nom, il serait sage de commencer par découvrir ce qui se cache derrière ces événements. »
languages.original_text: "Artisan Decabalus is too deft with his words. I would not recommend intervening on his behalf without first uncovering the full background to these events."

traits.locale_text: « L'artisan Décabalus est trop habile avec les mots. Avant d'intervenir en son nom, il serait sage de commencer par découvrir ce qui se cache derrière ces événements. »

languages.text: "Artifex Decabalus ist zu wortgewandt. Ich würde davon abraten, in seinem Namen zu intervenieren, ohne zuerst den Hintergrund dieser Ereignisse aufzudecken."
languages.original_text: "Artisan Decabalus is too deft with his words. I would not recommend intervening on his behalf without first uncovering the full background to these events."

traits.locale_text: "Artifex Decabalus ist zu wortgewandt. Ich würde davon abraten, in seinem Namen zu intervenieren, ohne zuerst den Hintergrund dieser Ereignisse aufzudecken."

languages.text: "Zanaatkâr Decabalus, kelimelerinde fazla hünerli. Olayların tüm arka planını ortaya çıkarmadan onun adına müdahale edilmesini tavsiye etmem."
languages.original_text: "Artisan Decabalus is too deft with his words. I would not recommend intervening on his behalf without first uncovering the full background to these events."

traits.locale_text: "Zanaatkâr Decabalus, kelimelerinde fazla hünerli. Olayların tüm arka planını ortaya çıkarmadan onun adına müdahale edilmesini tavsiye etmem."

languages.text: «El artesano Decabalus escoge sus palabras con demasiada habilidad. Recomiendo no intervenir en su nombre sin haber investigado a fondo lo que está sucediendo».
languages.original_text: "Artisan Decabalus is too deft with his words. I would not recommend intervening on his behalf without first uncovering the full background to these events."

traits.locale_text: «El artesano Decabalus escoge sus palabras con demasiada habilidad. Recomiendo no intervenir en su nombre sin haber investigado a fondo lo que está sucediendo».

languages.text: “匠人德卡巴洛斯十分善于言辞。我不建议在查清这些事件的全部背景之前，就为他出面干预。”
